summary: No-ship: the revoke path has no in-flight state guard, so a user can submit duplicate revoke requests before the first response updates the row.

findings.title: Revoke can be submitted multiple times while the first request is in flight
findings.recommendation: Add a revoking/in-flight guard in the store keyed by id, short-circuit duplicate revoke calls, and disable or hide the confirm/revoke controls from the page while that id is pending. Keep the row unchanged on failure or refresh/apply the server response after success.
